prompt: Control the second image to minimal design style of the first image.
prompt_refined: Edit image 2. Re-envision its design using the minimal aesthetic of image 1. Replace all photographic elements and detailed imagery with simplified line-art illustrations or subtle abstract shapes, consistent with image 1. Adopt a clean, light-colored background and the limited, cool-toned color palette of image 1, creating a more open and uncluttered layout.
objects: UI navigation elements (menu, search bar, links)
Limited, cool-toned color palette (blues, purples, greys)
